category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric or cordless power tools exported from China to the Kingdom of Bahrain, covering electrical safety, EMC, market access and conformity, environmental noise, and restricted-substance and battery considerations.

title.en: China-to-Bahrain Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Bahrain market-access requirements, including BSMD national conformity under MOIC, GSO-adopted IEC standards for electrical safety and EMC, TRA approval for cordless radio modules, and environmental noise considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与巴林市场准入要求差距对照，涵盖工商部（MOIC）下属 BSMD 的国家符合性、海湾标准组织（GSO）采用的电气安全与电磁兼容 IEC 标准、无绳无线模块的 TRA 审批以及环境噪声考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與巴林市場准入要求差距對照，涵蓋工商部（MOIC）下屬 BSMD 的國家符合性、海灣標準組織（GSO）採用的電氣安全與電磁相容 IEC 標準、無繩無線模組的 TRA 審批以及環境噪聲考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Bahrain law, GSO and BSMD requirements, TRA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林法律、GSO 与 BSMD 要求、TRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林法律、GSO 與 BSMD 要求、TRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Bahrain, the practical baseline is national conformity registration administered by BSMD under the Ministry of Industry and Commerce, using GSO standards that adopt the IEC 62841 series for electrical safety and the relevant IEC/CISPR electromagnetic compatibility standards; cordless tools with a wireless radio module additionally need TRA type approval. Bahrain operates on 230 V, 50 Hz.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入巴林，实务基线是由工商部下属 BSMD 管理的国家符合性注册，采用 GSO 标准（其引用 IEC 62841 系列电气安全及相关 IEC/CISPR 电磁兼容标准）；带无线无线电模块的无绳工具还需 TRA 型号核准。巴林电网为 230 V、50 Hz。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入巴林，實務基線是由工商部下屬 BSMD 管理的國家符合性註冊，採用 GSO 標準（其引用 IEC 62841 系列電氣安全及相關 IEC/CISPR 電磁相容標準）；帶無線無線電模組的無繩工具還需 TRA 型號核准。巴林電網為 230 V、50 Hz。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity body, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
